case_title: DEFU WEN VS. CHRISTINE TORRINGTON et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-15-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
